arts.ttl: Revealed: Jordan Pickford's two clever moments before saving Erling Haaland penalty
arts.sum: Everton took a point away from Manchester City as Erling Haaland was denied by Jordan Pickford, who saved a second-half penalty after some shrewd tactics to thwart the Norwegian

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gives surprising reaction to Manchester City failure vs Everton
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola felt his Manchester City team played well in draw against Everton but he was left ruing the champions' failure to put away their chances away

arts.ttl: Man City next six fixtures compared to Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea after Everton despair
arts.sum: Manchester City drew 1-1 in the Premier League with Everton on Boxing Day

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche has just done what nobody expected as Everton theories fall flat
arts.sum: Chris Beesley writes after Everton draw 1-1 at Manchester City to more points off the Premier League leading lights

arts.ttl: Man City fans are all saying the same thing about Erling Haaland after 1-1 draw against Everton on Boxing Day
Everton player ratings as two get 9/10 in excellent Man City draw
arts.sum: Everton player ratings for the 1-1 draw at defending Premier League champions Manchester City

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola disbelief and home chants spell more Man City trouble
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola tried to keep his players positive as they threw away a lead against Everton and then blew a chance to win it in a 1-1 draw

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland penalty saved by Jordan Pickford as Man City’s troubles continue
arts.sum: City’s poor form went on with a 1-1 draw with Sean Dyche’s Everton.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola accepts Man City may not make Champions League
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola admits Manchester City are at risk of missing out on Champions League qualification this season.

arts.ttl: Pep reveals Man City's January transfer plans
arts.sum: "If we can, we have to add players in January… definitely!" said Guardiola to Prime Video Sport in the lead-up to Man City's Boxing Day clash with Everton . Pep Guardiola has revealed Premier League champions Man City's plans for the January transfer window.
